debug_info.goal:
C : Set (Fin 3 → ℝ)
hC : Convex ℝ C
x y : Fin 2 → Fin 3 → ℝ
z : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2) → Fin 3 → ℝ
hxy : ∀ (i j : Fin 2) (s : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)), x i + y j + z s ∈ C ↔ (i, j) ∈ s
⊢ False

failed_attempts:
by
  classical
  have hx : x 0 + y 0 + z ({(0, 0)} : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) ∈ C := by
    simpa [hxy] using (show (x 0 + y 0 + z ({(0, 0)} : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2))) ∈ C ↔ (0, 0) ∈ ({(0, 0)} : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) from hxy 0 0 ({(0, 0)} : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2))).2 (by simp)
  have hy : x 1 + y 1 + z ({(1, 1)} : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) ∈ C := by
    simpa [hxy] using (show (x 1 + y 1 + z ({(1, 1)} : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2))) ∈ C ↔ (1, 1) ∈ ({(1, 1)} : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) from hxy 1 1 ({(1, 1)} : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2))).2 (by simp)
  trivial

by
  classical
  have h0 : x 0 + y 0 + z (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) ∈ C := by
    have := (hxy 0 0 (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2))).2
    simpa using this (by simp)
  have h1 : x 0 + y 0 + z (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) ∉ C := by
    have := (hxy 0 0 (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2))).1
    simpa using fun h => by
      have : (0, 0) ∈ (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) := this h
      simpa using this
  exact h1 h0

  have hx' : x 0 + y 0 + z (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) ∈ C ↔ ((0 : Fin 2), (0 : Fin 2)) ∈ (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) :=

by
  classical
  let x' : Fin 4 → Fin 3 → ℝ := fun i =>
    x (if (i : ℕ) < 2 then ⟨(i : ℕ), by
      have hi : (i : ℕ) < 4 := i.isLt
      exact lt_of_lt_of_le (by exact_mod_cast (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le hi (by decide : 4 ≤ 4))) (by decide)⟩
    else ⟨(i : ℕ) - 2, by
      have hi : (i : ℕ) < 4 := i.isLt
      have : (i : ℕ) - 2 < 2 := by
        have : (i : ℕ) ≤ 3 := Nat.lt_succ_iff.mp hi
        omega
      simpa using this⟩)
  let y' : Set (Fin 4) → Fin 3 → ℝ := fun s =>
    y 0 + z ((fun p : Fin 2 × Fin 2 => (p.1, p.2)) ⁻¹' Set.image (fun i : Fin 4 =>
      if (i : ℕ) < 2 then (⟨(i : ℕ), by
        have hi : (i : ℕ) < 4 := i.isLt
        omega⟩, 0)
      else (⟨(i : ℕ) - 2, by
        have hi : (i : ℕ) < 4 := i.isLt
        omega⟩, 1)) s) 0
  have : False := by
    have hx : ∀ i s, x' i + y' s ∈ C ↔ i ∈ s := by
      intro i s
      by_cases hi : (i : ℕ) < 2
      · have : (if (i : ℕ) < 2 then (⟨(i : ℕ), by
            have hi' : (i : ℕ) < 4 := i.isLt; omega⟩ : Fin 2) else
            ⟨(i : ℕ) - 2, by
              have hi' : (i : ℕ) < 4 := i.isLt; omega⟩) =
          (⟨(i : ℕ), by
            have hi' : (i : ℕ) < 4 := i.isLt; omega⟩ : Fin 2) := by
          simp [hi]
        simp [x', y', hi, this, hxy]
      · have : (if (i : ℕ) < 2 then (⟨(i : ℕ), by
            have hi' : (i : ℕ) < 4 := i.isLt; omega⟩ : Fin 2) else
            ⟨(i : ℕ) - 2, by
              have hi' : (i : ℕ) < 4 := i.isLt; omega⟩) =
          ⟨(i : ℕ) - 2, by
            have hi' : (i : ℕ) < 4 := i.isLt; omega⟩ := by
          simp [hi]
        simp [x', y', hi, this, hxy]
    exact vc_lt_four_of_convex_r2 (C := C) hC (x := x') (y := y') hx
  exact this

  have h10 := (hxy 1 0 (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)))
  have h11 := (hxy 1 1 (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)))
  have hx00 : x 0 + y 0 + z (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) ∉ C := by

  have hx01 : x 0 + y 1 + z (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) ∉ C := by

  have hx10 : x 1 + y 0 + z (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) ∉ C := by

  have hx11 : x 1 + y 1 + z (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) ∉ C := by

  have hx00' : x 0 + y 0 + z ({(0, 0)} : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) ∈ C := by

by
  classical
  have h00 : x 0 + y 0 + z (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) ∈ C := by
    simpa [hxy 0 0 (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2))]
  have h01 : x 0 + y 1 + z (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) ∈ C := by
    simpa [hxy 0 1 (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2))]
  have h10 : x 1 + y 0 + z (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) ∈ C := by
    simpa [hxy 1 0 (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2))]
  have h11 : x 1 + y 1 + z (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) ∈ C := by
    simpa [hxy 1 1 (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2))]
  have hc : (x 0 + y 0 + z (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) + (x 1 + y 1 + z (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2))))
        / (2:ℝ) ∈ C := by
    simpa [two_mul, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm, add_div]
      using hC.add_midpoint h00 h11
  have hd : (x 0 + y 1 + z (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) + (x 1 + y 0 + z (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2))))
        / (2:ℝ) ∈ C := by
    simpa [two_mul, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm, add_div]
      using hC.add_midpoint h01 h10
  have hx : (x 0 + x 1) / (2:ℝ) + (y 0 + y 1) / (2:ℝ) + z (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) ∈ C := by
    have : (x 0 + y 0 + z (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) + (x 1 + y 1 + z (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)))) / (2:ℝ)
        = (x 0 + x 1) / (2:ℝ) + (y 0 + y 1) / (2:ℝ) + z (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) := by
      ext a
      ring
    simpa [this] using hc
  have hy : (x 0 + x 1) / (2:ℝ) + (y 0 + y 1) / (2:ℝ) + z (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) ∈ C := by
    have : (x 0 + y 1 + z (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) + (x 1 + y 0 + z (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)))) / (2:ℝ)
        = (x 0 + x 1) / (2:ℝ) + (y 0 + y 1) / (2:ℝ) + z (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) := by
      ext a
      ring
    simpa [this] using hd
  have : False := by
    exact False.elim (by
      have := hx
      exact (by
        have := hy
        exact (by
          -- both sides are the same point; contradiction comes from shattering ∅ vs { (0,0) } below
          trivial )))
  -- direct contradiction: the same point is in C iff (0,0) ∈ ∅
  have : x 0 + y 0 + z (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) ∈ C ↔ False := by
    simpa [hxy 0 0 (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2))]
  exact (this.mp h00).elim

by
  classical
  have h0 : x 0 + y 0 + z (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) ∈ C := by
    simpa [hxy] using (by
      have : ((0 : Fin 2), (0 : Fin 2)) ∈ (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) := by simp
      exact (hxy 0 0 (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2))).2 this)
  simpa [hxy] using (hxy 0 0 (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2))).1 h0

by
  have h00 : x 0 + y 0 + z (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) ∈ C ↔ (0, 0) ∈ (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) :=
    hxy 0 0 (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2))
  simpa using h00

by
  classical
  -- Take `s = ∅` and `s = univ` and derive a contradiction at a fixed point.
  have h0 : x 0 + y 0 + z (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) ∈ C := by
    simpa using (hxy (i := (0 : Fin 2)) (j := (0 : Fin 2)) (s := (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)))).2
      (by simp)
  have h1 : x 0 + y 0 + z (Set.univ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) ∈ C := by
    simpa using (hxy (i := (0 : Fin 2)) (j := (0 : Fin 2)) (s := (Set.univ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)))).2
      (by simp)
  have hmid : x 0 + y 0 + ((1 / 2 : ℝ) • z (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) + (1 / 2 : ℝ) • z (Set.univ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2))) ∈ C := by
    have := hC.add_smul_mem h0 h1 (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (1 / 2 : ℝ))
      (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (1 / 2 : ℝ)) (by norm_num : (1 / 2 : ℝ) + (1 / 2 : ℝ) = (1 : ℝ))
    simpa [add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm, add_smul, smul_add] using this
  -- Now choose `s` such that `z s` equals the midpoint; using `hxy` twice forces `(0,0) ∈ s` and `(0,0) ∉ s`.
  let s : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2) := {p | p = (0, 0)}
  have hs0 : (0 : Fin 2, 0 : Fin 2) ∈ s := by simp [s]
  have hs1 : (0 : Fin 2, 0 : Fin 2) ∉ (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) := by simp
  -- Use `hxy` at `s` and `∅` to contradict membership equivalence by forcing the same point to be both in and not in `s`.
  have : (0 : Fin 2, 0 : Fin 2) ∈ (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) := by
    -- from `hxy` at `∅`, membership is false, contradiction
    have := (hxy (i := (0 : Fin 2)) (j := (0 : Fin 2)) (s := (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)))).1 h0
    simpa using this
  simpa using this

by
  classical
  have hx : x 0 + y 0 + z (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) ∈ C := by
    have : ((0 : Fin 2), (0 : Fin 2)) ∈ (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) ↔
        x 0 + y 0 + z (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) ∈ C := by
          simpa [hxy] using (hxy (0 : Fin 2) (0 : Fin 2) (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2))).symm
    simpa using this.mp (by simp)
  have hx' : x 0 + y 0 + z (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) ∈ C ↔
      ((0 : Fin 2), (0 : Fin 2)) ∈ (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) := by
    simpa [hxy]
  have : ((0 : Fin 2), (0 : Fin 2)) ∈ (∅ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) := (hx').1 hx
  simpa using this

classical
  let a : Fin 2 := 0
  let b : Fin 2 := 1
  have hab : (a : Fin 2) ≠ b := by
    decide
  let p : Fin 2 × Fin 2 := (a, a)
  let q : Fin 2 × Fin 2 := (a, b)
  let r : Fin 2 × Fin 2 := (b, a)
  let s : Fin 2 × Fin 2 := (b, b)
  have hpq : p ≠ q := by
    intro h
    have : (a : Fin 2) = b := by
      have := congrArg Prod.snd h
      simpa [p, q] using this
    exact hab this
  have hpr : p ≠ r := by
    intro h
    have : (a : Fin 2) = b := by
      have := congrArg Prod.fst h
      simpa [p, r] using this
    exact hab this
  have hps : p ≠ s := by
    intro h
    have : (a : Fin 2) = b := by
      have := congrArg Prod.fst h
      simpa [p, s] using this
    exact hab this
  have hqp : q ≠ p := hpq.symm
  have hqr : q ≠ r := by
    intro h
    have : (a : Fin 2) = b := by
      have := congrArg Prod.fst h
      simpa [q, r] using this
    exact hab this
  have hqs : q ≠ s := by
    intro h
    have : (a : Fin 2) = b := by
      have := congrArg Prod.fst h
      simpa [q, s] using this
    exact hab this
  have hrp : r ≠ p := hpr.symm
  have hrq : r ≠ q := hqr.symm
  have hrs : r ≠ s := by
    intro h
    have : (a : Fin 2) = b := by
      have := congrArg Prod.snd h
      simpa [r, s] using this
    exact hab this
  have hsp : s ≠ p := hps.symm
  have hsq : s ≠ q := hqs.symm
  have hsr : s ≠ r := hrs.symm
  let S₁ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2) := {p, q, r}
  let S₂ : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2) := {p, q, s}
  let A : Fin 3 → ℝ := x a + y a + z S₁
  let B : Fin 3 → ℝ := x a + y b + z S₁
  let D : Fin 3 → ℝ := x b + y a + z S₁
  let A' : Fin 3 → ℝ := x a + y a + z S₂
  let B' : Fin 3 → ℝ := x a + y b + z S₂
  let D' : Fin 3 → ℝ := x b + y a + z S₂
  have hA : A ∈ C := by
    simpa [A, p, S₁, a] using (hxy a a S₁).2 (by simp [S₁, p])
  have hB : B ∈ C := by
    simpa [B, q, S₁, a, b] using (hxy a b S₁).2 (by simp [S₁, q])
  have hD : D ∈ C := by
    simpa [D, r, S₁, a, b] using (hxy b a S₁).2 (by simp [S₁, r])
  have hA' : A' ∈ C := by
    simpa [A', p, S₂, a] using (hxy a a S₂).2 (by simp [S₂, p])
  have hB' : B' ∈ C := by
    simpa [B', q, S₂, a, b] using (hxy a b S₂).2 (by simp [S₂, q])
  have hD' : D' ∈ C := by
    simpa [D', r, S₂, a, b] using (hxy b a S₂).2 (by
      have : r ∉ S₂ := by
        simp [S₂, r, p, q, s, hrp, hrq, hrs]
      exact False.elim ((hxy b a S₂).1 (by
        simpa [D'] using hD') (by
        simpa [S₂, r] using this))
      )
  let t : ℝ := (1 : ℝ) / 2
  have ht0 : 0 ≤ t := by
    norm_num [t]
  have ht1 : t ≤ 1 := by
    norm_num [t]
  have hconv1 :
      t • A + (1 - t) • B ∈ C :=
    hC.smul_add_smul_mem hA hB ht0 ht1
  have hconv2 :
      t • A' + (1 - t) • B' ∈ C :=
    hC.smul_add_smul_mem hA' hB' ht0 ht1
  have hconv3 :
      t • (t • A + (1 - t) • B) + (1 - t) • (t • D + (1 - t) • (x b + y b + z S₁)) ∈ C :=
    by
      have hE : (x b + y b + z S₁) ∈ C := by
        simpa [S₁, s, a, b] using (hxy b b S₁).2 (by simp [S₁, s])
      have hAD : t • A + (1 - t) • B ∈ C := hconv1
      have hDB : t • D + (1 - t) • (x b + y b + z S₁) ∈ C :=
        hC.smul_add_smul_mem hD hE ht0 ht1
      exact hC.smul_add_smul_mem hAD hDB ht0 ht1
  have hconv4 :
      t • (t • A' + (1 - t) • B') + (1 - t) • (t • D' + (1 - t) • (x b + y b + z S₂)) ∈ C :=
    by
      have hE' : (x b + y b + z S₂) ∈ C := by
        simpa [S₂, s, a, b] using (hxy b b S₂).2 (by simp [S₂, s])
      have hAD' : t • A' + (1 - t) • B' ∈ C := hconv2
      have hDB' : t • D' + (1 - t) • (x b + y b + z S₂) ∈ C :=
        hC.smul_add_smul_mem hD' hE' ht0 ht1
      exact hC.smul_add_smul_mem hAD' hDB' ht0 ht1
  have hlin :
      t • (t • A + (1 - t) • B) + (1 - t) • (t • D + (1 - t) • (x b + y b + z S₁)) =
      t • (t • A' + (1 - t) • B') + (1 - t) • (t • D' + (1 - t) • (x b + y b + z S₂)) :=
    by
      ext u
      simp [A, B, D, A', B', D', t, sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm, mul_add,
        add_mul, smul_add, smul_smul, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, one_div]
  have : (t • (t • A + (1 - t) • B) + (1 - t) • (t • D + (1 - t) • (x b + y b + z S₁))) ∈ C :=
    hconv3
  have : (t • (t • A' + (1 - t) • B') + (1 - t) • (t • D' + (1 - t) • (x b + y b + z S₂))) ∈ C :=
    by simpa [hlin] using hconv3
  have hs1 : s ∉ S₁ := by
    simp [S₁, s, p, q, r, hsp, hsq, hsr]
  have hs2 : s ∈ S₂ := by
    simp [S₂, s]
  have : ((x b + y b + z S₁) ∈ C) ↔ s ∈ S₁ := by
    simpa [s, a, b] using (hxy b b S₁)
  have : ((x b + y b + z S₂) ∈ C) ↔ s ∈ S₂ := by
    simpa [s, a, b] using (hxy b b S₂)
  exact False.elim (hs1 (by
    have : (x b + y b + z S₁) ∈ C := (this).2 hs2
    exact (this).1 this))

by
  classical
  simpa using
    vc_lt_four_of_convex_r2 (C := C) hC (x := fun i => x i.1 + y i.2)
      (y := fun s => z (Prod.map (fun a : Fin 4 => a.1) (fun a : Fin 4 => a.2) ⁻¹' s))
      (by
        intro i s
        simpa [Fin.sum_univ_two, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using
          (hxy i.1 i.2 (Prod.map (fun a : Fin 4 => a.1) (fun a : Fin 4 => a.2) ⁻¹' s)))

by
  classical
  let s : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2) := {(0, 0), (1, 1)}
  have h00 : x 0 + y 0 + z s ∈ C := (hxy 0 0 s).2 (by simp [s])
  have h11 : x 1 + y 1 + z s ∈ C := (hxy 1 1 s).2 (by simp [s])
  have hconv := hC (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (1 : ℝ)) (by norm_num : (1 : ℝ) ≤ (1 : ℝ))
    (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) + (1 : ℝ) = (1 : ℝ)) h00 h11
  have hmem : (1 / 2 : ℝ) • (x 0 + y 0 + z s) + (1 / 2 : ℝ) • (x 1 + y 1 + z s) ∈ C := by
    simpa [one_div] using hconv

  classical
  let x' : Fin 4 → Fin 2 → Fin 3 → ℝ := fun i =>

      x' i + y' s ∈ C ↔ i ∈ s := by
    intro i s
    by_cases hi : (i : ℕ) < 2
    · have : x' i = x ⟨i, by simpa using hi⟩ := by
        simp [x', hi]
      simp [y', this, hxy]

        simp [x', hi]

by
  classical
  -- Let `s` encode the diagonal `{(i,i)}`. Shattering implies both membership and non-membership
  -- for the same translated point, a contradiction.
  let s : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2) := {p | p.1 = p.2}
  have hs00 : ((0 : Fin 2), (0 : Fin 2)) ∈ s := by simp [s]
  have hs01 : ((0 : Fin 2), (1 : Fin 2)) ∉ s := by simp [s]
  have hmem : x 0 + y 0 + z s ∈ C := (hxy 0 0 s).2 hs00
  have hnot : x 0 + y 0 + z s ∈ C ↔ False := by
    simpa [hs01] using (hxy 0 1 s)
  exact (hnot.mp ((hxy 0 1 s).1 ?_)).elim
  · -- derive `x 0 + y 1 + z s ∈ C` from `x 0 + y 0 + z s ∈ C` by convexity is impossible;
    -- instead, use `hxy` directly to get the contradiction on `x 0 + y 1 + z s`.
    -- We can obtain membership from `hxy` by picking an element that is in `s`,
    -- but `(0,1)` is not in `s`, hence contradiction follows from assuming membership.
    -- Here we use `hmem` to supply the required membership via definitional equality.
    simpa using hmem

by
  classical
  let x' : Fin 4 → Fin 2 → ℝ := fun i =>
    if h : i.1 < 2 then
      x ⟨i.1, h⟩
    else
      y ⟨i.1 - 2, by
        have hi : i.1 < 4 := i.2
        have hge : 2 ≤ i.1 := Nat.le_of_not_lt h
        have : i.1 - 2 < 2 := by omega
        exact this⟩
  let y' : Set (Fin 4) → Fin 2 → ℝ := fun s =>
    z {p : Fin 2 × Fin 2 | (Fin.mk p.1.1 (by omega), Fin.mk (p.2.1 + 2) (by omega)) ∈ s}
  have hxy' : ∀ (i : Fin 4) (s : Set (Fin 4)), x' i + y' s ∈ C ↔ i ∈ s := by
    intro i s
    by_cases hi : i.1 < 2
    · have : x' i = x ⟨i.1, hi⟩ := by simp [x', hi]
      simp [this, y', hxy, hi]
    · have hge : 2 ≤ i.1 := Nat.le_of_not_lt hi
      have hi' : i.1 - 2 < 2 := by
        have : i.1 < 4 := i.2
        omega
      have : x' i = y ⟨i.1 - 2, hi'⟩ := by
        simp [x', hi]
      have : (i ∈ s) ↔ (⟨i.1 - 2, hi'⟩, ⟨i.1 - 2, hi'⟩) ∈ {p : Fin 2 × Fin 2 |
          (Fin.mk p.1.1 (by omega), Fin.mk (p.2.1 + 2) (by omega)) ∈ s} := by
        constructor
        · intro his
          have : (Fin.mk (i.1 - 2) (by omega) : Fin 4) = i := by
            ext
            · have : i.1 = (i.1 - 2) + 2 := by omega
              simpa [Fin.mk, this]
            · rfl
          simpa [this, his]
        · intro h
          simpa [y'] using h
      simp [this, y', hxy, hi]
  exact vc_lt_four_of_convex_r2 (C := C) hC (x := x') (y := y') hxy'

by
  classical
  have h00 : x 0 + y 0 + z ∅ ∈ C := (hxy 0 0 ∅).2 (by simp)

  have h10 : x 1 + y 0 + z ∅ ∈ C := (hxy 1 0 ∅).2 (by simp)

  have hx1yAvg : x 1 + ((1 / 2 : ℝ) • y 0 + (1 / 2 : ℝ) • y 1) + z ∅ ∈ C := by

  have havg :
      ((1 / 2 : ℝ) • (x 0 + ((1 / 2 : ℝ) • y 0 + (1 / 2 : ℝ) • y 1) + z ∅) +
          (1 / 2 : ℝ) • (x 1 + ((1 / 2 : ℝ) • y 0 + (1 / 2 : ℝ) • y 1) + z ∅)) ∈ C :=
    hC.smul_add_smul (by norm_num) (by norm_num) hx0yAvg hx1yAvg

    simpa [add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm, smul_add, add_smul, smul_smul] using havg
  have hmem2 :
      ((1 / 2 : ℝ) • x 0 + (1 / 2 : ℝ) • x 1 +

    have h10' : x 1 + y 0 + z ({(0, 0), (1, 1)} : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) ∈ C :=

    have h11' : x 1 + y 1 + z ({(0, 0), (1, 1)} : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) ∈ C :=

    have hx0yAvg' : x 0 + ((1 / 2 : ℝ) • y 0 + (1 / 2 : ℝ) • y 1) +

    have hx1yAvg' : x 1 + ((1 / 2 : ℝ) • y 0 + (1 / 2 : ℝ) • y 1) +

            (1 / 2 : ℝ) •
              (x 1 + ((1 / 2 : ℝ) • y 0 + (1 / 2 : ℝ) • y 1) +
                z ({(0, 0), (1, 1)} : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)))) ∈ C :=
